title: First Job, First Pressure
text: You are 19 years old, living in a small apartment, with only €250 left. A local café offers you a low-paying job, but your friend wants you to join him in building a small online business.

choices.text: Take the café job for stability
choices.result: You gain stability, but the routine drains your energy.

choices.text: Join your friend and build the business
choices.result: You chase opportunity, but success is far from guaranteed.

choices.text: Reject both and focus on learning a high-income skill
choices.result: You invest in your future, but money becomes tight.

title: A New City
text: You get the chance to move to a bigger city where salaries are higher, but living costs are much worse. Staying means comfort. Leaving means uncertainty.

choices.result: The city feels alive and full of possibilities, but it is expensive.

choices.text: Stay where you are and save money
choices.result: You gain breathing room financially, but life feels repetitive.
You take a cautious step without fully committing.

title: The Tempting Shortcut
text: Someone offers you a fast way to make money online. It sounds easy, but the method feels questionable and could damage your future.

choices.text: Take the shortcut and cash in fast
choices.result: You make money quickly, but the danger grows in the background.
You stay safe, even if you feel a little frustrated.
You delay the decision and gather more information.

title: The Expensive Dream
text: A course appears that could change your future, but it costs almost all your savings. Buying it could open doors, or leave you broke.

choices.text: Buy the course and commit fully
choices.result: You bet on your growth, hoping the sacrifice pays off.

choices.text: Keep your savings and learn free resources instead
choices.result: You stay financially safe and move forward more slowly.

choices.text: Borrow money from a friend to get it now
choices.result: You gain access now, but pressure follows you.

title: Love or Ambition
text: Someone important to you wants more time and attention, but your career is finally gaining momentum. You cannot fully prioritize both right now.

choices.result: Your heart feels full, but your progress slows down.
You move forward fast, but the emotional cost is real.
You hold both worlds together, but it becomes exhausting.
